class \mbox{\hyperlink{classDomainHom3D}{Domain\+Hom3D}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Concrete domain for homogeneous 3D media. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Homogeneous 3D simulation domain (derived from \doxylink{classDomain}{Domain}). 

This class models a single region filled with homogeneous, isotropic material characterized by complex relative permittivity $\varepsilon_r$ and permeability $\mu_r$. It provides a homogeneous 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s function and sets up the PMCHWT SIE formulation. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{DomainHom3D_8h_source}{Domain\+Hom3\+D.\+h}}.
